summary: Backend-only testing of server.py refactor (v35). All 21 tests passed. Verified: (1) Extracted routers work - migrations_router, sitemap_router, reviews_router, upload_router, (2) GET /api/fabrics returns vendor_count field (all = 1 since article_id empty), (3) dedupe_by_article=true collapses fabrics with shared article_id and picks lowest rate_per_meter, (4) GET /api/fabrics/count?dedupe_by_article=true returns same count as without dedupe (192) since no shared article_ids, (5) GET /api/categories returns Cotton Fabrics with seo_title, seo_intro populated, (6) Admin login and /api/stats work correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin@locofast.com / admin123 returns token
GET /api/stats (auth) returns fabrics=192, categories, sellers counts
GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with urlset, loc elements
POST /api/migrate/greige (auth, dry run) returns status=noop (Greige category not present)
GET /api/categories returns Cotton Fabrics with seo_title='Buy Premium Cotton Fabrics Online — Wholesale Prices'
GET /api/fabrics returns fabrics with vendor_count field (all = 1)
GET /api/fabrics without dedupe returns all fabrics
GET /api/fabrics?dedupe_by_article=true returns same count when no shared article_ids
Dedupe test: created 2 fabrics with shared article_id, dedupe collapsed to 1 with vendor_count=2, winner has lowest rate_per_meter
critical_code_review_comments: server.py successfully slimmed from 1183 to 633 lines by extracting migrations_router, sitemap_router, reviews_router, upload_router
All extracted routers properly use auth_helpers.get_current_admin for authentication
fabric_router.py dedupe_by_article logic correctly picks lowest rate_per_meter as winner and increments vendor_count
Fabric model has vendor_count: int = 1 default, ensuring all fabrics return this field
sitemap_router.py generates valid XML with static pages, fabrics, collections, posts, categories, sellers
upload_router.py correctly validates content-type for images and videos
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test fabrics with shared article_id for dedupe testing, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py refactor v35 fully tested. All extracted routers (migrations, sitemap, reviews, upload) work correctly. Dedupe by article_id feature works - collapses fabrics with same article_id into one with vendor_count showing total vendors, winner is lowest rate_per_meter. Current DB has 192 fabrics, all with empty article_id so dedupe count equals non-dedupe count. Cotton Fabrics category has SEO fields populated (seo_title, seo_intro, seo_applications).
